channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the US. Here's what we know
item.description: A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Strange Connecticut laws, such as receiving a $99 fine for selling silly string to a minor
item.description: Among the keywords you can find in Connecticut law include "silly string," "balloons" and "arcade games." All these topics are involved in some of the state's strangest laws.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Leap of faith: A few young women in US buck the trends by joining the ranks of Catholic nuns
item.description: PALMYRA, Pa. (AP) — It was a radical idea, and for many years she had been resistant. But as Zoey Stapleton, 24, walked down a darkened hiking trail, steps behind her parents, she counted back from three and “took a leap of faith,” revealing to them that she wanted to become a nun.
item.dc:creator: JESSIE WARDARSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: International students urged to return to US campuses before Trump inauguration
item.description: CONCORD, N.H. (AP) — A growing number of U.S. colleges and universities are advising international students to return to campus before President-elect Donald Trump is inaugurated, over concerns that he might impose travel bans like he did during his first administration.
item.dc:creator: HOLLY RAMER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House rejects Trump-backed plan on government shutdown, leaving next steps uncertain
item.description: A day before a potential government shutdown, the House resoundingly rejected President-elect Donald Trump's new plan to fund operations and suspend the debt ceiling, as Democrats and dozens of Republicans refused to accommodate his sudden demands.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 1 dead in small plane crash near home of NFL player Dion Dawkins
item.description: One person died in a small plane crash Thursday morning close to the house of Buffalo Bills offensive lineman Dion Dawkins, police said.
item.dc:creator: Aidan Joly, NewsNation

item.title: NM Justice Depatment releases report on hazing involving NMSU men's basketball
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (KTSM) - The New Mexico Department of Justice (NMDOJ) released a 70-page report on their investigation into how NMSU handled hazing and sexual assault incidents involving the men's basketball program during the 2022-2023 season.
item.dc:creator: Jesus Baltazar, NewsNation

item.title: Indiana man to learn his sentence following conviction in 2017 killings of 2 teenage girls
item.description: DELPHI, Ind. (AP) — An Indiana man convicted in the 2017 killings of two teenage girls who vanished during a winter hike will face up to 130 years in prison when he's sentenced Friday in the case that's long cast a shadow over the teens' small hometown of Delphi.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Immigration drives highest US population growth in over 2 decades
item.description: The U.S. Census Bureau released a report Thursday showing that immigration drove the U.S. population's highest rate increase in over two decades.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan school shooter loses bid to withdraw guilty plea in 4 deaths
item.description: PONTIAC, Mich. (AP) — A judge on Thursday refused to allow a Michigan school shooter to withdraw his guilty plea to two dozen charges, including terrorism and first-degree murder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FDA updates definition of 'healthy' on food labels for first time in 30 years
item.description: A new rule from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) will update what it means for food to be labeled “healthy” for the first time in 30 years, a move that aligns with current nutrition science and is meant to help consumers better navigate food labels.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union are holding a strike at seven of the company’s delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Uvalde schools police chief loses bid to toss criminal charges related to 2022 shooting
item.description: UVALDE, Texas (AP) — A Texas judge on Thursday refused to throw out criminal charges accusing the former Uvalde schools police chief of putting children at risk during the slow response to the 2022 Robb Elementary School shooting, while a lawyer for his co-defendant said they want to move the upcomi
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Amazon workers strike at facilities around the country as Teamsters seek contract
item.description: Amazon says it doesn’t expect an impact on its operations during what the union calls the largest strike against the company in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, ABC 4

item.title: Suspected UnitedHealthcare assassin Luigi Mangione's plan to 'wack' CEO revealed in journal entries: affidavit
item.description: Suspected UnitedHealthcare CEO assassin Luigi Mangione allegedly kept a journal in which he mused over the crime and wrote a letter "To the Feds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump border czar: 100K beds, more ICE agents needed for deportations
item.description: “This will be an expense — this will be an expensive operation. But in the long run, it should be a — it would be a huge tax savings on the American people,” Homan said.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: James Gunn's 'Superman' trailer teases DC characters rarely seen in live-action movies
item.description: The trailer — which debuted one day after another, much shorter teaser — was posted to the film's social media pages and the DC Comics YouTube page at 9 a.m. Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, NewsNation

item.title: GloRilla makes big donation for Memphis school library
item.description: The hit-making rapper made the donation to Melrose High School in the Orange Mound neighborhood on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: David Royer, NewsNation

item.title: The Great Detachment: Why employees are increasingly dissatisfied with their jobs
item.description: (KRON) -- From the "Great Resignation" to the "Great Detachment?" That's where we are now, according to a new survey. Across the country, employees are feeling stuck and "increasingly detached from their jobs," according to the survey from Gallup, which came out earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Advocates train immigrants to 'prepare to stay' in the US under Trump
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Winston Leiva rattles off a long list of things immigrants should do to protect themselves against President-elect Donald Trump's promise to conduct mass deportations when he returns to the White House. Make a plan for someone to care for your children if you are arrested.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN and SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fani Willis disqualified as prosecutor on Trump Georgia election case
item.description: A Georgia appeals court booted Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis's (D) office from the 2020 election interference case against President-elect Trump on Thursday due to her relationship with a top prosecutor on the case.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Idaho prosecutors reject Bryan Kohberger's many attacks on search warrants
item.description: Idaho prosecutors have rejected a flurry of Bryan Kohberger's motions to attack search warrants in his arrest in the slaying of four university students.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harmful gas billowing from Texas and New Mexico comes mostly from smaller leaks, researchers say
item.description: The blob on the satellite image is a rainbow of colors. An analyst digitally sharpens it and there, highlighted in red, is the source: a concrete oil pad spewing methane.
item.dc:creator: TAMMY WEBBER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Kansas restaurant worker caught chopping meat on ground, owner explains why
item.description: The video shows an employee cutting up or hammering meat on the sidewalk or drive-thru pavement area right outside Tryyaki.
item.dc:creator: Dave D'Marko, Fox 5

item.title: Alleged would-be Trump assassin faces new charge in accident that nearly killed child: Florida authorities
item.description: The state of Florida has charged Ryan Wesley Routh with attempted felony murder in connection with a traffic accident that occurred when he fled police after an alleged assassination attempt on former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WGN 9

item.title: Walmart testing body cameras for some in-store employees
item.description: Some in-store Walmart employees are wearing body cameras as part of a pilot program, according to a company spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, ABC 4

item.title: 1 dead, 9 injured in Maryland shooting and fiery car crash: police
item.description: One person has died and nine others were injured following a shooting and related fiery car crash in Maryland on Tuesday, police said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, Fox 5

item.title: This Colorado restaurant only has 2 items on the menu
item.description: A Michelin-starred chef co-opened a restaurant in Denver with only two items on the menu: a burger and fries.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: Why shooting down mystery drones carries big risks
item.description: The buzz around the mysterious flurry of drones above New Jersey and other nearby states has prompted some officials, including President-elect Trump, to call for the U.S. military to shoot down the mystery objects. But such measures come with major risks, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, WGN 9

item.title: Stock market today: Wall Street trims its stellar gains, Dow slides again
item.description: The Fed is widely expected to announce the third cut of the year to its main interest rate on Wednesday, and officials are also scheduled to unveil projections about where they see rates heading in upcoming years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: A Michigan State University hockey player has been sued by a former opponent for injuries she suffered on the ice.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, ABC 4

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Shock poll: 41 percent of young voters find killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO acceptable
item.description: Anger over health insurance companies has been in the spotlight after Thompson was fatally shot Dec. 4 in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Taco Bell adding chicken nuggets to menus nationwide
item.description: Taco Bell, known for its Mexican-inspired cuisine, will begin serving its take on chicken nuggets later this month. Taco Bell’s Crispy Chicken Nuggets features tortilla breading and will be served with three sauces, including the first-ever Hidden Valley Fire Ranch.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, WGN 9

item.title: Trump sues Des Moines Register, pollster
item.description: “Selzer’s polling ‘miss’ was not an astonishing coincidence — it was intentional,” the complaint states.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5
